User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account in the system.

roleId.description: A reference to the user's role in the 'roles' collection.

Role.title: Role
Role.description: Defines a role with a set of privileges.

Ministry.title: Ministry
Ministry.description: Defines a ministry within the church.

Room.title: Room
Room.description: A bookable room within a location.

ApprovalRequest.title: Approval Request
ApprovalRequest.description: A request that requires admin approval and follows a dynamic workflow.

workflowId.description: A reference to the workflow this request follows.

currentStateId.description: A reference to the current state of this request within its workflow.

AttendanceRecord.title: Attendance Record
AttendanceRecord.description: A record of a user clocking in or out.

qrValue.description: The unique, randomized value for the QR code.

ScanLog.title: Scan Log
ScanLog.description: A record of a QR code scan event.

scannerId.description: The UID of the user operating the scanner.

scannerName.description: The name of the user operating the scanner.

details.description: A human-readable summary of the scan event.

targetUserId.description: The UID of the user who was the subject of the scan (e.g., for attendance).

Workflow.title: Workflow
Workflow.description: Defines a custom process with states and transitions.

name.description: The name of the workflow, e.g., 'Approval Process'.

description.description: A brief explanation of the workflow's purpose.

WorkflowState.title: Workflow State
WorkflowState.description: Represents a single stage or column in a workflow.

name.description: The display name of the state, e.g., 'Pending Review'.

order.description: The display order of the state in the workflow.

workflowId.description: A reference to the parent workflow.

WorkflowTransition.title: Workflow Transition
WorkflowTransition.description: Defines an allowed movement from one state to another.

name.description: The name of the action that triggers this transition, e.g., 'Approve'.

workflowId.description: A reference to the parent workflow.

fromStateId.description: The starting state for this transition.

toStateId.description: The destination state for this transition.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profile information. Document ID should match the Firebase Auth UID.

/roles/{roleId}.description: Stores role definitions and associated privileges.

/approvals/{approvalId}.description: Stores approval requests for various actions.

/mealstubs/{stubId}.description: Stores meal stub information for users.

/scan_logs/{logId}.description: Stores a log of all QR code scan events.

/workflows/{workflowId}/states/{stateId}.description: Stores the states (columns) for a specific workflow.

/workflows/{workflowId}/transitions/{tra.description: Stores the allowed transitions between states for a workflow.
